messages.content: You are an autonomous driving agent. You have access to multi-view camera images of a vehicle: (1) front view (which you should focus on with the most attention) <image>, (2) front right view <image>, and (3) front left view <image>. Your task is to do your best to predict future waypoints for the vehicle over the next 10 timesteps (5 seconds at 0.5-second intervals), given the vehicle's intent inferred from the images. Provided are the previous ego vehicle status. Positive x means forward direction while positive y means leftwards.
